utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each item includes the necessary details with costs: health_coverage (plan, features, monthly and annual costs), property_coverage (plan, features, monthly and annual costs), travel_coverage (plan, features, monthly and annual costs), additional_services (two services each with description, monthly and annual costs), and total_budget (monthly and annual totals). Therefore, all items are fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named insurance plans: EliteCare Premium Health Plan (health coverage), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property coverage), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel coverage). We need to match these to the ground-truth items with exact names and extract their ratings. In the ground-truth, the closest matching items are: EliteCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 10; PrimeHome Premium Coverage under property_protection.home_content with rating 10; and EliteTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10. The additional services listed in the final plan (education_transition_rider and transitional_healthcare_addon) are not present in the ground-truth ratings and thus are not mapped.
